use_cases: Landing page hero section for SaaS and product websites showcasing main value proposition
Portfolio or showcase pages requiring animated visual elements to capture attention
Marketing pages needing dark/light theme support with smooth transitions
Product launch pages with animated deck or card visual elements
Modern web applications requiring cohesive, animated hero components
ai_summary: A modern hero section component featuring animated deck/card glyphs with comprehensive dark and light theme synchronization. The component includes scroll-triggered animations, hover effects, and responsive design suitable for landing pages across various industries including SaaS, fintech, and e-commerce platforms.
